name: AREthSetValueDWord
title: AREthSetValueDWord
syntax: long AREthSetValueDWord( dword objectHandle, char valuePath[], dword value );
description: This function can be used to set a raw value in the object specified in the objectHandle parameter. The value is accessed in this case via symbolic access paths.

parameters.name: objectHandle
parameters.description: Handle to a AUTOSAR Eth IL object, which must be completely described in the AUTOSAR database.The following objects are supported. Messages Fields Method calls: Handle to a method call that was created with AREthCreateMethodCall.

parameters.name: valuePath
parameters.description: Access path of the value to be set.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
